title: The Kangaroo Kid
writer: Anthony Scott Veitch, Sherman L. Lowe
actors: Jock Mahoney, Veda Ann Borg, Guy Doleman
plot: Tex Kinnane (Jock Mahoney as Jock O'Mahoney), posing as a stage driver, goes to Australia to investigate a series of robberies at Goldstar. He makes friends at the saloon with Baldy Muldoon (Alex Kellaway) and barmaid Stella Grey ...
